commentaries.author: John Chrysostom
commentaries.content: The evil is not in the cohabitation but in the impediment to purity in the life.

commentaries.author: Methodius of Olympus
commentaries.content: But for him who of his own free will and purpose decides to preserve his flesh in virgin purity, "having no necessity"

commentaries.author: Oecumenius
commentaries.content: It is clear from this that someone who has been overcome by apparent impropriety, even if married, is not yet firmly established in the work of the Lord. .
